properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v2 v3 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My God is awesome, He can move mountains Keep me in the valley, hide me from the rain My God is awesome, He heals me when I’m broken Strength where I’ve been weakened, forever He will reign.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My God is awesome, awesome, awesome, awesome, My God is awesome, awesome, awesome, awesome.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My God is awesome, Savior of the whole world Giver of salvation, by His stripes I am healed My God is awesome, today I am forgiven His grace is why I’m living, praise His holy name.
